# .github/docs/ — Copilot Proxy Documentation

> ⚠️ Files in this directory are **proxies**. Do NOT edit them directly.
> Source of truth: [`.ia/context/`](../../.ia/context/)

GitHub Copilot reads documentation from this directory. Content is synced from `.ia/context/`.

## Files

| Proxy file | Source of truth |
|-----------|----------------|
| [`ai-context.md`](ai-context.md) | [`.ia/context/ai-context.md`](../../.ia/context/ai-context.md) |
| [`architecture.md`](architecture.md) | [`.ia/context/architecture.md`](../../.ia/context/architecture.md) |

## How to update

1. Edit the source file in `.ia/context/`
2. Copy the updated content into the corresponding proxy between the `SYNCED CONTENT` markers
3. Commit both files together
